action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace. Analysis: implement a minimal non-RL heuristic baseline using the highly informative goal_to_agent_gps_compass sensor, with a quick sign calibration during train.py and a local one-episode predict self-test before the first eval as required. Decision: write model/train/predict/inspect scripts, run a short environment smoke test plus tiny checkpoint creation, then submit eval immediately to validate runtime and harness contract.
action.command: mkdir -p local_eval checkpoints/baseline && python inspect_env.py && python train.py --save_dir checkpoints/baseline --episodes 1 --max_steps 80 && python predict.py --data_path "$(pwd)/local_eval" --checkpoint "$(pwd)/checkpoints/baseline" --output "$(pwd)/local_eval/out.json" --num_episodes 1
